question.text:
Dear all,

 

Please see attached mail, CNTAO local has disscussed this issue with 康姐, using EGALYT05-EGALYT02 under ocean route is not logical in system

 

Thanks & Best Regards!

 

Frankie Huang/ 黄梓轩

answer.text:
Dear Finn,

 

Since EGALYT05 and EGALYT02 is under same location EGALY, so impossible to create an ocean(trunk or feeder) link between 2 them.

If the Delivery Term of the bookings can change to CY, then we can create a inland link of EGALYT05-EGALYT02 (similar as carrier’s haulage route) , if it must be Free Out term at EGALY, then the route only can be POL=CNTAOT02 ~POD=EGALYT05.  As for the movements, Terminal T/S costs and feeder charge if any, it has to be settled manually.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


发送时间: 2026年3月10日 20:00
收件人: Fr
